def negative_django_all_without_limit_in_view():
    rule_id = "django_all_without_limit_in_view"
    family = "framework"
    severity = "contextual"
    status = "stable"
    intent = "shows the preferred shape that should not trigger this rule"
    description = "Django views call .all() without visible pagination, slicing, or limiting."
    return rule_id, family, severity, status, intent, description
